description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the blang/latex:ctanfull Docker image and defines a single stage called build. Add a job named build that runs in the build stage and executes the shell commands: xelatex main, bibtex main, xelatex main, and xelatex main. Configure the job to collect all generated PDF files ("*.pdf") as artifacts. No services, caches, or conditional rules are required.
